text: Tender turkey slow-cooked underground with maguey leaves and spices. Served with handmade tortillas and salsa, it’s a festive dish rooted in community tradition.
Crispy tostadas topped with beans, cheese, salsa, and pickled vegetables. A crunchy, colorful snack that’s popular in local markets and gatherings.
Soft, slightly sweet bread made with fermented agave drink. Its unique flavor and fluffy texture make it a regional favorite during celebrations and morning meals.
